creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Building with poudriere.
The actual error message:

c++  *.o /usr/local/lib/libsuperlu.a -L/usr/local/lib -lblas -lf2c -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath=/usr
/local/lib/gcc46  -L/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -lm -o tochnog
/usr/local/lib/libblas.so: could not read symbols: File in wrong format
*** Error code 1

The full log: 

http://eis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/tochnog-20010211_8.log
